heroTitulo: I develop web experiences with a visual and functional focus.
heroDescripcion: Frontend developer focused on clean design, usability, and attractive web interfaces.
proyectosDescripcionTerraViva: Development of a web booking platform for rural accommodations, designed with a focus on usability, accessibility, and responsive design.
